name: Andy Roddick City Courts
description: Andy Roddick City Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Granite Shoals, TX. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Destined for Greatness
description: Destined for Greatness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burnet, TX. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Fresh AF Park
description:
Fresh Air Park - Cottonwood Shores: Where Pickleball Gets Lit!

Calling all Pickleheads! Get ready to serve up some fun under the stars at Fresh Air Park's brand new, state-of-the-art pickleball courts.
Features:

*4 lighted courts: Play day or night, no matter the weather!
*Reservations: Grab your court time online and avoid the wait.
*Organized Open Play: Meet new players, make friends, and level up your game.
*Lessons & Clinics Coming Soon: Whether you're a beginner or a pro, get ready to take your skills to the next level.

The Perfect Pickleball Destination:
Located in the heart of Cottonwood Shores, Fresh Air Park isn't just about pickleball. Enjoy delicious food truck fare, a refreshing drink at the wine bar, and let the kids loose in the playground. It's the ultimate family-friendly destination for pickleball enthusiasts!
Don't miss out on the action. Book your court today and experience pickleball like never before!

#FreshAirPark #Pickleball #CottonwoodShores #GetLit

name: Granite Shoals - Andy Roddick Center
description: Granite Shoals - Andy Roddick Center is a place to play pickleball in Meadowlakes, TX. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hidden Falls Pickleball
description: Hidden Falls Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Meadowlakes, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free.

name: Templeton’s Tavern
description: This is a court at an outdoor bar. Brand new. Has lights. Live music too. Pets welcome. See their Facebook page for up to date hours, music, food and more. Minutes from Spider Mountain and Lake Buchanan.

name: YMCA Of The Highland Lakes At Galloway Hammond
description: YMCA Of The Highland Lakes At Galloway Hammond is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burnet, TX. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food and restrooms. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Members only — $5.00 Day Pass Or Can Buy YMCA Membership.
